remarks: Perfectly positioned in Stamford's sought-after Newfield neighborhood, this beautifully maintained home combines generous living space, exceptional flow, and a prime location. Set on approximately half an acre of professionally landscaped property, the residence lives like a 5-bedroom home thanks to its flexible layout and versatile living spaces. Designed for both everyday living and entertaining, the open floor plan creates a seamless flow throughout the home, while numerous skylights fill the interior with natural light. Hardwood floors, spacious rooms, and multiple fireplaces add warmth and character throughout. The flexible floor plan offers endless possibilities for today's lifestyle, including space for guests, home offices, recreation areas, or additional living quarters. An expansive deck overlooks the private backyard and provides the perfect setting for outdoor dining, entertaining, or relaxing. A Belgian block-lined driveway, charming white picket fence, and attached garage enhance both curb appeal and convenience. Additional features include public water, public sewer, and natural gas. Ideally located near shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, downtown Stamford, Metro-North, and major commuting routes, this exceptional home offers the perfect combination of space, comfort, flexibility, and convenience in one of Stamford's most desirable neighborhoods.
